# Publifai

> Websites for small businesses, built on WhatsApp.

Publifai is a product of PublifyX Tech Pvt. Ltd. We help India's small businesses get professional websites through a simple WhatsApp conversation — no dashboards, no code, no agencies.

## What we do

- AI-powered website creation via WhatsApp/Telegram chat
- Professional hosting on custom domains or subdomains
- SEO optimization for Google and AI search engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, etc.)
- Ongoing website updates and maintenance through chat
- Business listing and digital presence management

## Who we serve

~63 million Indian SMBs — chai stalls, tutors, clinics, freelancers, local shops, and small service businesses that need a web presence but don't have the time, budget, or tech skills for traditional website builders.

## How it works

1. Message us on WhatsApp
2. Tell us about your business
3. We build your website within 48 hours
4. Update it anytime — just send a message

## Pricing

- Free tier: Publifai subdomain, up to 3 pages
- Starter: ₹199/month
- Pro: ₹499/month
- Business: ₹999/month
